title: Department Manager Vacancy at La Opala - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at La Opala - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at La Opala are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Indore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About La Opala:
La Opala is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with La Opala!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
